industrialSolutions: We provide integrated industrial solutions including oil and fuel tank systems, industrial control panels, motion control systems, and Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT). We work with you from design and installation to operation and maintenance to ensure safe and reliable performance in production environments.

hero.title: Engineering Precision. Digital Intelligence. Industrial Impact.
hero.text: We combine advanced analytics, high-accuracy engineering, and smart software technologies to deliver end-to-end solutions that strengthen performance and unlock new opportunities.

aboutus.title: About Us
aboutus.text: Be Control, founded in 2020, is a leading Syrian Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) company specializing in advanced industrial solutions. With decades of expertise in electronics, electrical power systems, and the information industry, Be Control integrates classic industrial control with modern technologies to deliver smart, reliable, and future-ready automation solutions. Our work spans industrial automation, IIoT integration, digital transformation, and custom-designed control systems built to meet the evolving needs of today’s industries. We are committed to innovation, quality, and long-term value for our clients.
